prompt: Can you create an AGENTS.md domain doc for the billing module? I want AI agents to understand the gotchas and cross-boundary stuff without having to read every file. The codebase is at /Users/josh/.claude/skills/spec-workspace/test-project/.
assertions: AGENTS.md is placed at a path like internal/billing/AGENTS.md next to the code, NOT inside .specs/
Document does NOT restate function signatures, parameter lists, or type definitions from source code
Document mentions the immediate-cancellation-on-failure behavior as a gotcha
Document mentions that ChargeResult is consumed by external systems
User is asked about Cursor integration for .cursor/rules/*.mdc file generation
